securitySubtitle: How your data is handled — and how to verify it independently.

securityData.label: Where analysis runs
securityData.value: Inside your browser only. DuckDB-Wasm is a full SQL engine compiled to WebAssembly — it runs entirely on your machine, not on any server.

securityData.label: Is the file uploaded?
securityData.value: No. Your file is read by the browser's File API and passed to the engine in memory. It is never transmitted over the network.

securityData.label: Are column names sent anywhere?
securityData.value: No. Column names and schema are inferred locally inside DuckDB-Wasm.

securityData.label: Are query results stored?
securityData.value: No. Results stay in browser memory and disappear when you close the tab.

securityData.label: Data retention
securityData.value: Zero. Closing the tab wipes everything. No localStorage, no IndexedDB, no server-side storage.

securityNetwork.label: Page load
securityNetwork.value: JS, CSS, and the WASM engine binary are served from Vercel CDN. Standard delivery — no user data involved.

securityNetwork.label: Authentication (Clerk)
securityNetwork.value: A session-validity check is made on page load. Clerk does not receive any file data, column names, or analysis results.

securityNetwork.label: After file upload
securityNetwork.value: Zero outbound requests. Once a file is loaded, all processing is local. You can even go offline.

securityNetwork.label: Analytics / tracking
securityNetwork.value: None. No cookies, no fingerprinting, no Google Analytics or similar SDKs on data tool pages.

securityGdpr.label: Personal data server-side
securityGdpr.value: None. File contents never reach a server.

securityGdpr.label: Data Processing Agreement
securityGdpr.value: Not required for core data tools — StackMe processes no personal data. May apply to Clerk (auth) if your organisation requires DPAs with all sub-processors.

securityGdpr.label: Cookies
securityGdpr.value: Clerk sets a session cookie for authenticated users only. No tracking cookies.

securityGdpr.label: Right to erasure (GDPR Art. 17)
securityGdpr.value: N/A — we hold no user data to delete.

securityVerifyIntro: You don't have to trust this page. Any auditor can verify the zero-egress claim independently:
securityVerifySteps: Press F12 → Network tab → clear the request log
Drop any CSV or JSON file onto the upload zone
Watch the Network tab: zero outbound requests carrying your data
